message:
test(e2e): add comprehensive form validation E2E tests

Add form-validation.spec.ts with 22 tests covering:
- Session form required field validation (threadId, sender, recipients, excerpt)
- Pattern validation (threadId alphanumeric, sender PascalCase)
- Length limit validation (threadId 64, subject 128, question 256 chars)
- Error message accessibility (aria-describedby, aria-invalid, role=alert)
- Real-time validation with debouncing (blur triggers)
- Search input behavior (empty search, debounce, results/empty state)
- Excerpt basket interactions (open/close, empty state, theme, persistence)

All tests properly handle lab mode disabled (404) gracefully.

Closes brenner_bot-kw6g

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
